title: Release Notes
description: Changelog and feature history for NemoClaw releases.
content:
Release Notes
Alpha software NemoClaw is in alpha, available as an early preview since March 16, 2026
APIs, configuration schemas, and runtime behavior are subject to breaking changes between releases
Do not use this software in production environments
File issues and feedback through the GitHub repository as the project continues to stabilize. NVIDIA NemoClaw is available in early preview starting March 16, 2026. Use the following GitHub resources to track changes. Resource Description Releases Versioned release notes and downloadable assets. Release comparison Diff between any two tags or branches. Merged pull requests Individual changes with review discussion. Commit history Full commit log on main
